goal: Encode Verra forestry methodology support so methodology-linked reviews can be consumed by app.article6 after encoding, starting with VM0007 and leaving room for later Verra forestry methods.
notes: VF1 source PDF provenance is verified for VM0007 v1.8.
VF2 section audit completed: expanded from 6 to 31 entries with TOC-derived hierarchy, page ranges, and source_audited locator status.
VM0007 remains not ready for methodology-linked review while rules stay draft_unverified and external Verra dependencies remain unencoded.
Deeper subsections (e.g., 4.2.1, 5.1.1) from extracted text are not yet mapped as separate sections.

phases.name: Expand to modern Verra forestry methods
